---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability for nfswolf
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that nfswolf does not currently support?

## Proposed solution

How would the feature behave from the user's perspective? CLI flag? New subcommand? Change to an existing output?

## RFC / spec reference

If this is a new protocol capability, cite the relevant RFC section. Protocol changes need a spec citation per the project's design rules.

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Related findings (F-x.y), similar features in other tools, prior art.
